title: URP pack
description: texture pack of URP | made for cpvp and pvp optimisation
body:
# URP Pack

**URP Pack** is a PvP-focused texture pack designed specifically for **Crystal PvP (CPvP)**.  
It provides clean visuals, high visibility, and optimized textures to help you react faster and stay focused during intense fights.

## 🔥 Features

- Optimized textures for **Crystal PvP**
- Clear and simple design for better readability
- Improved visibility for:
  - End Crystals
  - Obsidian
  - Totems
- FPS-friendly textures
- Ideal for competitive PvP and practice

## ⚔️ Made for CPvP

URP Pack is built with **performance and clarity** in mind.  
Every texture is designed to reduce distractions and give you a tactical advantage during fast-paced CPvP battles.

## 📦 Recommended For

- Crystal PvP players
- Competitive PvP
- Practice servers

## 🛠️ Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition
- Works best with PvP clients (Meteor, Future, etc.)
- Compatible with most shaders (results may vary)


---

**URP Pack — Clean. Fast. Deadly.**
